landing.heroDesc: When Daejeon-Chungcheong small businesses register products, unforgeable HMAC-signed QRs are auto-generated. Customers verify authenticity with one scan; admins detect cyber attacks in real time.
landing.feature1Desc: Auto-issue unforgeable official QRs with SHA-256 signatures
landing.feature2Desc: Instant safe/warning/danger detection. Fake QRs expose nothing
landing.feature3Desc: Detect 5 attack types: SQLi, XSS, Brute Force, IDOR, Fake QR
landing.feature4Desc: Replay 5 attack types with one button during presentations
landing.mapDesc: Platform for small businesses in Daejeon, Sejong, South & North Chungcheong
landing.footer: 🛡️ 대충실드 QR — Official Auth Platform for Daejeon-Chungcheong SMBs | Hackathon 2025

register.title: Merchant Registration
register.subtitle: Join as a 대충실드 QR store owner
register.bizNumInfo: 💡 Enter the 10-digit number on your business registration certificate for real-time NTS verification.
register.step4: Approved → Add products freely + Get QR codes
register.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.
register.errBizRequired: Please enter a 10-digit business registration number.

dashboard.title: My Store Dashboard
dashboard.bannerApprovedDesc: You can freely register products. QR scans show Official Certified status.
dashboard.bannerFlaggedDesc: Admin review in progress. QR will show Warning status.
dashboard.bannerPendingDesc: Admin is reviewing your store. You can still add products. QR shows official certification after approval.
dashboard.storesEmpty: No stores registered. You can create one by registering a product.
dashboard.storeApproved: ✅ All product QRs for this store are officially certified.
dashboard.storePending: ⏳ QR becomes officially certified after approval.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate this product?

productCreate.title: Register Product
productCreate.subtitle: HMAC-signed QR is auto-generated immediately upon registration
productCreate.noStoreWarn: ⚠️ No store found. Please create a store first.
productCreate.descriptionPlaceholder: XSS attack attempts are auto-detected and sanitized.
productCreate.successSubtitle: Official HMAC QR has been auto-generated.

publicProduct.dangerTitle: This QR does not exist or may be counterfeit
publicProduct.dangerWarning: This link may not be an official 대충실드 QR. Do not make payments or enter personal information.
publicProduct.dangerSecurityNote: Access to this page has been recorded in the security log.
publicProduct.successSubtitle: This is an officially certified 대충실드 QR page

report.title: Report Product
report.detailPlaceholder: Please describe the suspicious activity in detail.
report.ipNote: Your IP address will be saved with the report.
report.doneMessage: Your report has been submitted. Admin will review it.
report.autoFlagged: ⚠️ Product auto-deactivated after 3 reports. Admin has been notified.
